home.description: Hello I'm, Adi Aryasuta, also known as Adi. I'm form Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia. I specialize in full-stack web developer, handling everything from front-end and back-end to cloud infrastructure. My toolkit includes TypeScript, Next.js, Nest.js, and more

description: Hello! I'm Gung Adi, a multi-disciplinary developer with expertise in Full-Stack Web, Mobile, and Game Development, based on the beautiful island of Bali 🇮🇩.
I primarily work as a freelance developer, helping clients bring their digital ideas to life. Alongside my freelance work, I contribute as a part-time Game Programmer at Palm Game Studio.
Passionate about community building, I lead Primakara Developers, a local developer community in Bali. I enjoy sharing my learning journey and empowering fellow developers to grow.
